title: NEXUS: Twilight
description: A modpack built for explorative, cartoonish, and fun gameplay. Incorporating mods such as Enchancement and Knight Quest, it brings a fresh taste to the aspects of Minecraft.
body:
![The NEXUS title for every NEXUS modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f7b5c6235ec8042a92a6b7bd79e4f802970d7a.png)
**NOTE! This is a modpack that is a work-in-progress. Bugs may occur. Please report them wherever possible.**

## Outline
- A modpack designed to improve every aspect of Minecraft, but more particularly honed towards exploration
- Designed for the Tricky Trials (1.21) update, improving Trial Chambers with more open, explorative, and less maze-like chambers (as well as adding Trial Towers on the surface)
- Enhanced with mods such as Enchancement, Knight Quest, and Refined Advancements

## Author's Note
> Hey, I'm cups! I'd just like to say thank you to you (the reader), my friends, and all the mod developers who made this modpack possible. I usually play this with my friends, but I wanted to share this whole modpack with everyone so they can have a great experience though. I hope you all have a great time! - cupstv

## Performance and Compatibility
- This modpack should be compatible with all platforms (Windows, macOS (untested), and Linux (Linux Mint)).
- It's recommended to run this modpack with 3GB-4GB of RAM, especially with **Distant Horizons**. If you are having severe client or server lag, please disable **Distant Horizons** for smoother gameplay.
- The modpack has been somewhat optimised and should run with smooth frames. Please tell me if you have any issues and have a proposed solution for it. (Distant Horizons has been disabled by default due to lag.)

## Highlighted Mods
- Enchancement
  - Overhauls the enchanting system, adding a variety of enchantments that enhance building, mining, and combat
- Knight Quest
  - Adds a new layer of armour and equipment, with new bosses and mobs to find
- Not Enough Trials
  - Overhauls the trial chambers to feel more open and less maze-like, with new chambers and redesigned existing chambers
- Fabric Waystones (Wraith Waystones)
  - Integrates a convenient mode of transport with a magical feel
- Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage
  - Adds a new layer of modular storage organisation
